data.title: Customer Care Helpline
data.content: MG Motor India provides a dedicated customer care helpline for queries, complaints, and assistance. Customers can call 1800-100-6464 for support.

data.title: Roadside Assistance (RSA)
data.content: 24x7 roadside assistance is available for breakdowns, towing, battery issues, and emergency situations across India.

data.title: Email Support
data.content: Customers can contact MG Motor India via email for detailed queries, complaints, and documentation support.

data.title: Live Chat Support
data.content: MG Motor India offers live chat support through its official website to assist customers in real time.

data.title: Dealer Assistance
data.content: Authorized MG dealerships provide in-person support for vehicle servicing, test drives, and customer queries.

data.title: Service Booking Support
data.content: Customers can get help with booking service appointments through the website, app, or dealership support.

data.title: Warranty Support
data.content: MG provides warranty-related assistance including claims, coverage details, and extended warranty support.

data.title: Mobile App Support
data.content: MG connected car mobile app provides support features like vehicle tracking, service alerts, and remote diagnostics.

data.title: Complaint Resolution
data.content: MG Motor India offers structured complaint resolution with escalation support for unresolved issues.

data.title: FAQ Support
data.content: Customers can access frequently asked questions on the website for quick self-service support.
